tasks.label: cargo test console-ui (build only)
tasks.command: cargo test --package console-ui --no-run && (Get-ChildItem 'D:/Rust/cargo/debug/deps/console_ui-*.exe' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Copy-Item -Destination 'D:/Rust/cargo/debug/deps/console_ui.exe' -Force)

tasks.label: cargo test all (build only)
tasks.command: cargo test --workspace --no-run && (Get-ChildItem 'D:/Rust/cargo/debug/deps/console_ui-*.exe' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Copy-Item -Destination 'D:/Rust/cargo/debug/deps/console_ui.exe' -Force)
